Assembly: The assembly fProBol1.1 is based on 40x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, retained haplotig separation with purge_dups, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. sex chromosomes could not be identified.
